name: QuickBooks Online
description: Monitor QuickBooks Online employee records and access for HR compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Create an app at https://developer.intuit.com
2. Set environment to Production
3. Add redirect URI: https://api.trycomp.ai/v1/integrations/oauth/callback
4. Copy Client ID and Client Secret to Comp AI admin panel
5. After connecting, enter your QuickBooks Company ID (found in the URL when logged into QuickBooks Online)

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews QuickBooks Online employee records and verifies active vs terminated status
